description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding wooden chest or cabinet with a rich, reddish-brown finish and a dark, polished top surface. The cabinet features three horizontal drawers on one side, each equipped with metallic handles and a key lock, with a key visible in one of the locks. The sides of the cabinet have recessed brass handles, suggesting it is designed to be carried or moved. The corners are reinforced with metallic brackets, adding both structural integrity and decorative detail. The base is slightly raised and black, providing a subtle contrast to the main body. The overall appearance is elegant and robust, suitable for secure storage in an urban environment such as a garage, office, or upscale residential setting.
description: A polished, reddish-brown wooden cabinet with three drawers, brass handles, and metallic corner brackets, resting on a black base. It features a key lock and recessed side handles for portability.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the smooth wooden surface, brass side handle, and metallic corner brackets.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the uninterrupted wood panels and the brass handle on the opposite side.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the three drawers, metallic handles, and a key inserted in one lock.
description_view_3: Right-side view with all three drawers, their handles, and the key clearly visible.
